name: Venom's Fang
why: A strong Legendary relic that excels in Nature teams by applying poison effects and dealing sustained damage over time. A powerful offensive option, though generally overshadowed by Frost Diadem in endgame Nature lineups.
description: Unleashes Venomous Assault to poison enemies, dealing continuous damage over time while increasing pressure on enemy teams. Venom's Fang is an excellent offensive relic for Nature compositions and remains a valuable choice throughout the late game.
